# v0.1.16

## 中文

- 新增抽检功能，可按数量或百分比随机检测账号（[#17](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/17)）。
- 数量与比例同时设置时，按较小的抽检范围执行。
- 支持按照当前分类范围进行抽检。
- 抽检时保留未选中账号的现有巡检结果。
- 新增 FreeBSD amd64 版本支持。

## English

- Added sample inspection by account count or percentage ([#17](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/17)).
- When both values are specified, the smaller sample scope is used.
- Supports sampling within the currently selected category.
- Existing results for accounts not selected in the sample are preserved.
- Added FreeBSD amd64 support.
